table.name: product_catalog
table.description: Complete product catalog table containing information about luxury products from various brands including Sephora, Tiffany & Co., Louis Vuitton, Belmond, and TAG Heuer

columns.name: id
columns.description: Auto-incrementing unique identifier for each product record

columns.name: product_id
columns.description: Unique product identifier with format 'PRD-XXXXXXXX' where X represents hexadecimal characters

columns.name: sku
columns.description: Stock Keeping Unit - unique identifier for inventory management, format varies by brand (e.g., 'S-FRA-0001', 'T&C-JEW-0013')

columns.name: name
columns.description: Full product name including brand, product type, and collection/season information

columns.name: brand
columns.description: Brand name (Sephora, Tiffany & Co., Louis Vuitton, Belmond, TAG Heuer)

columns.name: category
columns.description: High-level product category (e.g., Fragrances, Skincare, Makeup, Jewelry, Handbags, Watches, Experiences, etc.)

columns.name: subcategory
columns.description: Specific product subcategory within the main category (e.g., Eau de Parfum, Cleanser, Lipstick, Brooch, Backpack, etc.)

columns.name: price
columns.description: Product price with up to 10 digits total, 2 decimal places for cents/centimes

columns.name: currency
columns.description: Three-letter ISO currency code (default: EUR for Euro)

columns.name: stock_status
columns.description: Current inventory status of the product

columns.name: created_at
columns.description: Timestamp when the product record was created in the catalog
